{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forger jaws
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra's binding]] contains a [[Forged]] set of jaws with green teeth.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
